scripts.video:frames: rm -rf out/frames && remotion render src/index.ts ShitClaudePromo out/frames --sequence --image-sequence-pattern='frame-[frame].[ext]' --muted
scripts.video:render: npm run video:frames && ffmpeg -y -framerate 30 -i out/frames/frame-%03d.jpeg -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -movflags +faststart out/shitclaude-promo.mp4
